title: Reference Architecture Alignment Schema
description: Schema describing component-level mappings between AADL models and reference architecture components.

AADL_model.description: Identifier or name of the AADL model containing the mapped component

component_name.description: Original name of the component in the AADL model

normalized_name.description: Normalized component name used to improve consistency across mappings

ra_component.description: Reference architecture component assigned to the AADL component
